options.name: <object_list>
options.description: Specifies the pin/port list for which clock gating check is to be reported.

options.name: -view
options.description: View for which clock gating check is to be reported. Default is worst of all views (string, optional) > <file_name> # Redirect output to file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <file_name> # Redirect output to file
